jobDescription:
Job Title: Senior MERN Stack Developer
We are looking for a highly skilled MERN Stack Developer to join our engineering team. You’ll be responsible for managing the entire software development lifecycle, from conceptualization to deployment.

As a full-stack expert, you should be equally comfortable wrangling complex data schemas in MongoDB as you are crafting fluid, high-performance interfaces in React. If you’re a problem-solver who enjoys building scalable web applications and keeping up with the ever-evolving JavaScript ecosystem, we want to hear from you.

Core Responsibilities
Full-Stack Development: Design and maintain robust, scalable web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js).

API Design: Build and consume RESTful APIs or GraphQL to connect the frontend with backend services.

Database Management: Design efficient database schemas and optimize queries for performance and scalability.

Performance Optimization: Identify bottlenecks and ensure the application remains responsive and snappy under high traffic.

Collaboration: Work closely with UX/UI designers to translate wireframes into high-quality code and collaborate with QA to squash bugs.

Code Quality: Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code while participating in peer code reviews.

Technical Requirements
Frontend: Proficiency in React.js, including Hooks, Context API, and state management libraries (Redux or Zustand).

Backend: Strong mastery of Node.js and Express.js for server-side logic.

Database: Experience with MongoDB and Mongoose (knowledge of SQL is a nice bonus for hybrid projects).

Tooling: Familiarity with Git version control, Webpack, and modern CI/CD pipelines.

Testing: Experience with testing frameworks like Jest, Mocha, or Cypress.

Soft Skills & Values
Analytical Thinking: You don't just fix the bug; you find out why it happened.

Adaptability: You’re comfortable switching gears in an agile environment.

Wit & Communication: You can explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders without sounding like a manual.

Bonus Points
Experience with Docker and Kubernetes.

Knowledge of TypeScript (because types make life easier).

Cloud experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
selfDescription:
I'm a passionate freelance MERN stack developer currently pursuing my B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering from MAKAUT. With expertise in MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js, along with solid foundations in PHP and SQL, I build dynamic web applications that solve real-world problems.

What drives me: The thrill of debugging complex code and transforming ideas into functional solutions. As a self-learner, I continuously explore new technologies and best practices to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving tech landscape.
title: Untitled Position
